description: Phase 12 — Widget Outreach Target Database (30 targets)
embed_code: <iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy" title="Mortgage Affordability Calculator"></iframe>

targets.name: The Mortgage Reports
targets.about: Leading mortgage education and news site. Covers rates, affordability, buying guides.
targets.audience_fit: Directly mortgage-focused — calculator is perfectly aligned with content
targets.pitch_angle: Free, accurate mortgage affordability widget for your readers — uses standard DTI ratios, already built

targets.name: Home Buying Institute
targets.about: Comprehensive first-time homebuyer education and guides.
targets.audience_fit: Their entire audience is homebuyers — perfect fit for affordability calculator
targets.pitch_angle: Your readers are literally buying homes — give them a free affordability calculator right on your guides

targets.name: NeighborWorks America
targets.about: National nonprofit creating affordable housing opportunities. Homebuyer education.
targets.audience_fit: Housing counselors and first-time homebuyers — directly relevant
targets.pitch_angle: Free tool for your homebuyer education program — helps counselors and clients together

targets.name: Dough Roller
targets.about: Long-running personal finance and investing blog with mortgage and real estate sections.
targets.audience_fit: Established personal finance audience with homebuying interest
targets.pitch_angle: Add a free mortgage affordability calculator to your tools section — clean embed, no signup

targets.name: University of Illinois Extension — Financial Literacy
targets.about: .edu financial literacy program with resources for families and homeowners.
targets.audience_fit: Educational audience — calculator fits perfectly in financial literacy curriculum
targets.pitch_angle: Free educational tool for your financial literacy program — helps teach DTI ratios hands-on

targets.name: Money Under 30
targets.about: Personal finance advice for young adults — budgeting, saving, home buying, investing.
targets.audience_fit: Young adults planning first home purchase — high overlap with mortgage affordability
targets.pitch_angle: Help your readers figure out how much house they can afford before they start looking

targets.name: Maximum Real Estate Exposure
targets.about: Real estate education blog by an experienced agent. Covers home buying extensively.
targets.audience_fit: Real estate blog with homebuying audience — directly relevant
targets.pitch_angle: Give your homebuyer readers a free interactive tool — works right on your blog

targets.name: Jump$tart Coalition
targets.about: National coalition for financial literacy education. Resources for teachers and students.
targets.audience_fit: Financial literacy educators — calculator as a teaching tool for homebuying concepts
targets.pitch_angle: Hands-on DTI teaching tool — students learn by adjusting real numbers. Free, no data collection.

targets.name: NFCC (National Foundation for Credit Counseling)
targets.about: Nonprofit credit counseling and financial education organization.
targets.audience_fit: Counselors helping clients with homebuying decisions — tool for client education
targets.pitch_angle: Free tool for your housing counselors — clients can use it during and after sessions

targets.name: Budgets Are Sexy
targets.about: Popular personal finance blog with a fun, relatable voice. Covers budgeting, saving, home buying.
targets.audience_fit: Readers actively planning major purchases — natural fit for affordability calculator
targets.pitch_angle: Fun, practical tool your readers can use right on your site — matches your voice

targets.name: Millennial Money
targets.about: Personal finance and investing for millennials. Home buying is a major topic.
targets.audience_fit: Millennials in prime homebuying years — directly relevant
targets.pitch_angle: Your millennial readers are buying homes — give them a free calculator to figure out their budget

targets.name: Marriage Kids and Money
targets.about: Family-focused personal finance. Home buying for growing families is a core topic.
targets.audience_fit: Families planning home purchases — directly relevant
targets.pitch_angle: Help families figure out their homebuying budget — free, clean, family-friendly tool

targets.name: BiggerPockets
targets.about: Largest real estate investing community. Blog, forums, calculators, and education.
targets.audience_fit: Real estate investors evaluating property purchases — affordability matters
targets.pitch_angle: Investor-friendly affordability widget — help your community analyze deals faster

targets.name: Zillow Porchlight Blog
targets.about: Zillow's consumer blog covering home buying, selling, and real estate trends.
targets.audience_fit: Massive homebuyer audience — calculator would complement their tools perfectly
targets.pitch_angle: Complement your existing tools with a clean, embeddable affordability widget

targets.name: MyMoney.gov
targets.about: Federal government financial literacy portal. .gov domain — high authority.
targets.audience_fit: Government financial education — calculator as a public resource tool
targets.pitch_angle: Free public-service tool for your homebuying resources section — .gov backlink, no cost

targets.name: State Employees Credit Union — Financial Education
targets.about: Large credit union with a dedicated financial education section.
targets.audience_fit: Member education — mortgage affordability is a core financial literacy topic
targets.pitch_angle: Free educational tool for your member financial literacy program — no data collection

targets.name: HUD Approved Housing Counseling Agencies — Resource Pages
targets.about: Federal housing counseling program. .gov domain, high authority.
targets.audience_fit: Homebuyer education — calculator as a public resource for HUD counselors
targets.pitch_angle: Free public resource for HUD housing counselors and their clients — no cost, no data collection

targets.name: Physician on FIRE
targets.about: Financial independence for physicians and high-income professionals. Covers mortgages.
targets.audience_fit: High-income professionals buying homes — need affordability context
targets.pitch_angle: Free medical professional home affordability calculator — simple, clean, no data collection

targets.name: The Penny Hoarder
targets.about: Massive personal finance site covering saving money, making money, and major life purchases.
targets.audience_fit: Mass audience with homebuying interest — high traffic potential
targets.pitch_angle: Free interactive tool for your homebuying guides — keeps readers on your site

targets.name: Practical Money Skills
targets.about: Visa's financial literacy program with free educational resources.
targets.audience_fit: Broad financial literacy audience — home affordability is a core topic
targets.pitch_angle: Free interactive tool for your financial literacy resources — teach home affordability hands-on

targets.name: The Balance — Home Buying
targets.about: Major personal finance education site with comprehensive home buying guides.
targets.audience_fit: Education-focused audience researching home buying — calculator fits naturally
targets.pitch_angle: Interactive affordability tool for your home buying education content — free, no setup

targets.name: Frugalwoods
targets.about: Frugal living and financial independence blog. Covers home buying and mortgage payoff.
targets.audience_fit: FIRE-minded readers planning major purchases strategically
targets.pitch_angle: Help your FIRE readers make smart homebuying decisions with a free interactive tool

targets.name: Our Next Life
targets.about: Early retirement and intentional living blog. Covers housing decisions extensively.
targets.audience_fit: Readers making intentional housing choices — affordability is key
targets.pitch_angle: Intentional living starts with knowing what you can afford — free tool for your readers

targets.name: Navy Federal Credit Union — Blog
targets.about: Largest credit union in the US. Extensive member education resources.
targets.audience_fit: Military families buying homes — affordability tool for VA loan context
targets.pitch_angle: Free interactive tool for your member resources — helps military families plan home purchases

targets.name: Making Sense of Cents
targets.about: Popular personal finance blog covering saving, making money, and lifestyle.
targets.audience_fit: Broad personal finance audience — home buying is a common topic
targets.pitch_angle: Free embeddable tool for your homebuying content — no signup, no data collection

targets.name: Investopedia — Mortgage Section
targets.about: Major financial education site with extensive mortgage and real estate content.
targets.audience_fit: High authority, massive audience — mortgage affordability tool would be a natural addition
targets.pitch_angle: Interactive widget for your mortgage education content — free, accurate, no signup

targets.name: Rent.com Blog
targets.about: Major rental platform with blog covering rent-vs-buy decisions and homebuying.
targets.audience_fit: Rent-vs-buy audience — affordability calculator helps them compare options
targets.pitch_angle: Help renters explore homeownership — free affordability calculator widget

targets.name: NerdWallet — Mortgages
targets.about: Major consumer finance site with comprehensive mortgage comparison tools and guides.
targets.audience_fit: Their audience is actively researching mortgages — calculator fits perfectly
targets.pitch_angle: Free embed widget for your mortgage guides — complements your existing calculators

targets.name: Redfin Blog
targets.about: Major real estate brokerage blog with buying guides and market data.
targets.audience_fit: Homebuyers actively browsing listings — calculator helps set budget expectations
targets.pitch_angle: Free widget to complement your buying guides — no signup, clean design

targets.name: Better Mortgage Blog
targets.about: Digital mortgage lender with educational blog content about home buying.
targets.audience_fit: Mortgage-focused — calculator could complement their educational content
targets.pitch_angle: Educational widget for your content — clean, unbranded, free
